review_title: Very fast paced and depends on your boss for WFH arrangement
review_body_text: Some department have a very well established job segregation. However, the team I'm with currently with does not. I have a boss that cannot manage his own workload, not to mention his team. He has the principle as if he is paying everyone's salary. One member of the team gets lower workload than the other. One get heavier than the other. He urges that anyone with heavy workload to work even at night or weekends to finish the tasks and compares to the other if refuse / have any obligations rather than doing so. Also, the group as a whole encouraging hybrid working arrangement. But the dept. Just dream on hybrid arrangement. They loveee to micromanage the staff so no hybrid working exists.

review_title: Senior and team leaders are very helpful
review_body_text: I dont have any sort of problem when I worked there but for those who deals with anxiousness or someone who got cold feet easily, you may have harder time to adapt, but overall I think it is a nice place to work at.
Overall is good and recommended Good transport Good place for professional learning Good management, training provided Friendly colleagues Work life balance
Nice place work future your experience , have support team superb and have to nice with hq people if you want get something and very difficult to transfer for others department if HOD dont want it

Start the day with lots of meeting. It is not how good you are but rather how smart you are. Management culture is very weak, not supportive and always manipulative. Hardest part is there is no clear direction and is ever changing. Only enjoyment is when we pack nags and go home.
Good perks and benefits. Also very friendly colleagues and superiors. Good salary package together with bonus and performance bonuses. Highly recommended.
Fun and friendly environments to work , hybrid available for some departments. Salary I think is lower than market and hospital benefits below average

review_title: Efficiency, productive with happy working culture and healthy environment
review_body_text: Overall it is healthy management with happy working environment. Management is pushing monthly sales in a reasonable way. Management are helpful and they will provide leads of target for sales staffs
Fun workplace. Everyone is veryyyy friendlyyyyyy and also greattt communicationnnm with team membersss. nice workplacee and environment is very very good

review_title: Interesting workplace for interns in accounting.
review_body_text: We need to study the place where there is lack in sustainability as this is the factor important is todays world. I learned sustainability banking is a part of finance and more. I enjoyed making reports and presentations. Do reach me out if you need to see my research presentation.
Good culture, The management is helpful and new innovation is happening everyday. The benefits are par with industry. Hybrid working environment and nice colleagues.

This place is so good to start your career also the salary is high. i learn a lot at here. The manager is nice, the colleague is supportive. Love it!! But you need to handle stress because of the customer is really drive you crazy.

Best place to work. The environment is very healthy and got so much support from colleagues and managers. Eventhough there's challenges in doing sales, but when there's team spirit, you will be able to achieve everything

CIMB is best place to work depending on the position u have and your job role and responsibility.. i was so happy to be part of the team. I was under BDC assign to work at airport. They give unlimited rewards and appreciation if you perform well.. unfortunately the bdc i worked had to close due to covid. I got transferred to brach under FSC PFC role..but im not good with this position so i resigned.
Best financial organization which will encourage employee to improve his or her skill and knowledge The good things Flexible working time and friendly team mate
Exposed to unrelated management politics. Multiples of reschuffling of management (i.e staffs transfer). Lack of in-depth learning and development between staffs.

Management not care about your job growth. Will temminate your contract after the period even perform good they always look for new hires. salary is very low for fresh grad mine was rm2200, medical benefit also low. basically everything is low for contract staff and they dont fight for your wellbeing
job_title: Executive Trainee - Audit Confirmation Unit, GIOD Branch Support
pros_text: Dont have to work long hours

review_body_text: No career growth and always on contract then later terminate your contract even if u already pro at the job and boss never fight for you to stay they always look for new hires and not appreciate the existing employees. Very low salary too.

review_title: Very good environment but a little bit stressful
review_body_text: Good started for fresh graduate, because offered competitive salary as living in Kuala Lumpur. But need to ready mental as need to handle different types of customers.
cons_text: Stress handle different types of customers

review_title: Fast pace working environment with rewarding career
review_body_text: Excellent place to gain experience and understand the whole banking business. Working as an RM in CIMB provides me the opportunity to earn and advance my career faster than my peers. Although I was skeptical about accepting sales position but with the guidance from everyone, I hope I would have joined much earlier, especially when the market was booming!!
